name: awesome-ascend-plugins
description: A marketplace of Ascend NPU developer plugins covering AscendC operator development, model migration, quantization, profiling analysis, and AI for Science workflows.

plugins.name: ascendc-operator-studio
plugins.description: Self-contained, closed-loop agent plugin for end-to-end AscendC custom operator development on Ascend NPU (ascend-kernel / csrc/ops + build.sh + torch_npu). Drives a new operator from a name and a math spec through environment, project init, two-level tiling design, op_host/op_kernel code generation and framework registration, compile/install/debug, PyTorch-style API docs, precision evaluation and root-cause debugging, torch_npu.profiler performance benchmarking, performance optimization, and security code review.

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: A comprehensive example plugin demonstrating all Claude Code extension options including commands, agents, skills, hooks, and MCP servers.

plugins.name: profiling-analysis
plugins.description: Ascend NPU profiling collection, analysis, and memory profiling for vLLM serving. Provides profiling analysis, remote collection, batch sweep, HBM memory profiling, and local memory analysis workflows.

plugins.name: msmodelslim
plugins.description: Model quantization on Ascend NPUs using msmodelslim. End-to-end workflow: quantize → serve → evaluate → analyze. Covers W4A8/W8A8/W4A4 quantization, YAML config authoring, mixed precision for MoE/VLM, sensitive layer analysis, vLLM Ascend serving, and AISBench evaluation.

plugins.name: ai-for-science-ai4s-basic
plugins.description: AI for Science general Ascend NPU model migration skill for moving PyTorch, TensorFlow, and vLLM CUDA projects to Huawei Ascend NPU. Covers environment checks, code analysis, automated migration, manual adaptation, distributed training, third-party library replacement, validation, and custom skill authoring.

plugins.name: ascend-torchnpu-migration-plugin
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for migrating traditional deep learning models (PyTorch) to Huawei Ascend NPU via the torch_npu adaptation layer. Covers environment setup, code migration, precision verification, and report generation.

plugins.name: ascend-migration-torchnpu-agent
plugins.description: Claude Code agent plugin for migrating traditional deep learning models from CPU/GPU to Huawei Ascend NPU via torch_npu adaptation layer. Handles environment setup, code migration, interface replacement, debugging, and verification reporting.
